title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL, including best practices for data storage and querying. The course is offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School with supporting communities across multiple platforms. David J. Malan leads the instruction.
